div.font: Each Service Network also supports HTTP / HTTPS app traffic via VPC Lattice Services (east-west; out of scope). This guide uses VPC Resources: shared endpoints (TCP 443), the egress proxy (TCP 3128), and ingress via Service Network Endpoints.
